grammarNote.title: Science in Hiding
grammarNote.explanation:
La planque est ici. Le cerveau d'Avril fonctionne. Il faut injecter le sérum. — science happens in a hideout (planque).

Notice pourri (rotten) — a judgment. C'est pourri. Look at the picture. What is rotten?

Re-read and find every scientific action (injecter, poser). How does the informal setting (planque) contrast with the formal science?

vocabulary.meaning: to put down, to ask (a question)
